parameters.name: quality
parameters.label: Quality
parameters.description: Determines the visual quality of the results. The higher the quality, the more computationally expensive it is.

parameters.name: sampledirs
parameters.label: Sample Directions
parameters.description: For each pixel, rays are sent out in random directions to see if there is a surface nearby that would occlude the ambient light to this pixel. This parameter controls how many rays are sent out per pi

parameters.name: samplesteps
parameters.label: Sample Steps
parameters.description: Since this is a 2D pixel-based operation, the rays need to sample multiple neighboring pixels along its path to check for points of interest. This parameter controls how many of these samples each ray

parameters.name: surfaceavoid
parameters.label: Surface Avoid Angle
parameters.description: This parameter biases the angle of the rays so they don't travel too close to the plane that the starting point lays on (as determined by the point's normal).

parameters.name: ssaopassres
parameters.label: SSAO Pass Resolution
parameters.description: The SSAO pass can be set to Full, Half, or Quarter the resolution of the input image.

parameters.name: ssaoradius
parameters.label: SSAO Radius
parameters.description: The distance it searches from the current point for occluders (in object space units).

parameters.name: contrast
parameters.label: Contrast
parameters.description: Controls the contrast of the SSAO contribution.

parameters.name: attenuation
parameters.label: Attenuation
parameters.description: Controls the attenuation of the ambient lighting.

parameters.name: edgethresh
parameters.label: Edge Threshold
parameters.description: To avoid the ambient occlusion from bleeding across the edges of objects onto other objects, an edge detect is done using the depth buffer to figure where one object ends and the next one begins. This

parameters.name: blurradius
parameters.label: Blur Radius
parameters.description: The amount of blur in pixels.

parameters.name: blursharpness
parameters.label: Blur Sharpness
parameters.description: Controls the sharpness of the blur operation.

parameters.name: combinewithcolor
parameters.label: Combine with Color
parameters.description: By default the final ambient occlusion result will be multiplied by the color output of the Render . You can just output the ambient occlusion results by turning this parameter off.

examples.label: Configure SSAO Radius and Contrast
examples.description: Common settings from 4 real Derivative examples
